'''Leeds''' was [[Senior Lieutenant/Legends|Senior Lieutenant]] aboard the [[Interrogator/Legends|''Interrogator'']].<ref name="TLF" />

While his superior, [[Jovan Vharing]], slept, he intercepted a signal that matched the frequency of an older [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] transmission code coming from the planet [[Qlothos]].<ref name="TLF" />

Suspecting a Rebel garrison, the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] sent a squad of [[TIE/sa tactical bomber/Legends|TIE Bombers]] to [[Attack on Qlothos|destroy]] it but the planet's atmosphere disrupted their missiles' signals and one strayed, ending in killing around sixty prominent Imperials in a residential community.<ref name="TLF" />

For Leeds' mistake, Vharing was executed personally by [[Antinnis Tremayne]] and Leeds found himself replaced by [[Waleran]].<ref name="TLF" />
